content: We can frame the existing Self-Refine iterative self-improvement framework as a single-perspective baseline that can be enhanced by integrating the multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from modern LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a multi-perspective Self-Refine framework that outperforms both original approaches. This hybrid framework retains Self-Refine's key advantage of requiring no extra supervised training or reinforcement learning, while addressing its limitation of getting stuck in local optimization loops from uniform self-feedback.
